title: Monanthotaxis glomerulata
taxonomy: Monanthotaxis glomerulata is classified within the family Annonaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. The Annonaceae family includes over 200 genera and 2,000 species, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions. Monanthotaxis glomerulata is a specific genus within this family and is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Monanthotaxis glomerulata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Annonaceae family.
